name: 1password
description: 1Password plugin for Claude Code (also usable as a skill collection in Codex and Gemini CLI): Environments, vault/item management, SSH/Git, guided setup

scripts.test: bash tests/entrypoints.test.sh && bash tests/skill-paths.test.sh && bash tests/plugin-manifest.test.sh && bash tests/genericity.test.sh && node --test tests/parse-dotenv.test.js tests/compare-env-names.test.js tests/check-account-binding.test.js && bash tests/redact-output.test.sh
